signals.npcLine: Relay walls are hissing again. Watchers just widened the sweep grid.
signals.questPulse: Trace pressure spikes through the district relay lattice and lock contaminated channels.
signals.worldFeed: District surveillance pressure surged; control relays are cycling unscheduled sweeps.
signals.clueEvent: Node telemetry shows synchronized signal contamination across cross-district links.

signals.npcLine: Courier shadows are slipping under blind sectors. Someone is mapping our patrol cadence.
signals.questPulse: Intercept covert lane traffic and recover relay keys before they exit Signal Spire.
signals.worldFeed: Unmarked courier bursts detected; ward channels report control drift at sector edges.
signals.clueEvent: Sweep logs reveal falsified beacon pings masking movement between relays.

signals.npcLine: Clue net says SAM just flagged a ghost directive. Nobody is claiming authorship.
signals.questPulse: Decode intercepted directive fragments and identify who rerouted district control authority.
signals.worldFeed: Anomaly pressure rising: command signatures mismatch declared faction routes.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted archive shards reference an unauthorized override window at midnight sweep.

signals.npcLine: North relay just dropped into partial silence. Expect pressure teams to flood in.
signals.questPulse: Stabilize unstable support nodes and hold the lane against forced control handoff.
signals.worldFeed: Support infrastructure under strain; faction pressure teams contest utility sectors.
signals.clueEvent: Probe chain marks repeated tampering on low-priority maintenance relays.

signals.npcLine: Street listeners caught a burst of spoofed IDs. Somebody is walking inside trusted bands.
signals.questPulse: Inject trace markers into live feeds and expose the spoof chain origin.
signals.worldFeed: Signal trust degraded in active sectors; authentication drift is spreading.
signals.clueEvent: Hidden timestamps align with covert entry windows across three district relays.
